TH_ALICE-MEET_MENGZI.title: Wounded Yumeko
TH_ALICE-MEET_MENGZI.pages.INITIAL.descr:
You leisurely walk on the path to the higher floors of the tower.

Suddenly, a [jitter][gold]golden figure[/gold][/jitter] catches your eye. Yumeko is kneeling on the ground, knives stuck in the walls around her, and the bandages wrapped around her wounds [sine]occasionally ooze [red]blood[/red][/sine]!

[fade_in]“Yumeko? What happened to you!”[/fade_in]
You rush over anxiously to ask.
“[fade_in]Ali...ce?[/fade_in]”

However, [gold]Yumeko[/gold] seems too agitated upon hearing your voice, aggravating her injury. She falls unconscious before finishing her sentence.
TH_ALICE-MEET_MENGZI.pages.DRINK.descrip:
[sine][blue]Gulp gulp gulp[/blue][/sine]

You feed Yumeko a potion you find. Her complexion improves, and she seems to have recovered somewhat. She should wake up soon.
TH_ALICE-MEET_MENGZI.pages.BUY.descripti:
You go to a nearby shop and buy some medicine. You feed some to the unconscious Yumeko and re-bandage her wounds.

Her complexion improves, and she seems to have recovered somewhat. She should wake up soon.
TH_ALICE-MEET_MENGZI.pages.BACK.descript:
You choose to ignore her.

[gold]Yumeko[/gold] is the strongest Makai person; surely her physique will be [sine]fine[/sine][thinky_dots]... right?[/thinky_dots]

[red]Thinking this, you force yourself to put it out of your mind, but the irritation clings like a [jitter]persistent ghost[/jitter].[/red]
TH_ALICE-MEET_MENGZI.pages.AWAKE.descrip:
[gold]Yumeko[/gold] wakes up and explains her situation:

Since Alice never returned to Makai, the [jitter][purple]Creator of Makai[/purple][/jitter], missing her daughter, sent [gold]Yumeko[/gold] to find her.

On her way, Yumeko encountered three mysterious men calling themselves [blue]knights[/blue]. After fruitless negotiations, she fell into a tough battle, barely winning, and rested there[thinky_dots]...[/thinky_dots] until Alice arrived.

After hearing her purpose, you tell [gold]Yumeko[/gold] that you don't plan to return yet.

Hearing this, Yumeko picks up her backpack from the ground and says: “[fade_in]I still have some leftover items and gold. Take whatever you can use.[/fade_in]”
TH_ALICE-MEET_MENGZI.pages.RELIC.descrip: You pick some usable items from [gold]Yumeko[/gold]'s backpack, then bid her farewell and continue upward.
TH_ALICE-MEET_MENGZI.pages.GOLD.descript: You take some gold from [gold]Yumeko[/gold]'s backpack for emergencies, then bid her farewell and continue upward.
TH_ALICE-LOUIS_SHOP.title: Louise's Mysterious Shop
TH_ALICE-LOUIS_SHOP.pages.INITIAL.descri:
A small shop in a street corner catches your eye. The shopkeeper looks [jitter][gold]somewhat familiar[/gold][/jitter], like[thinky_dots]...[/thinky_dots] a [jitter][purple]Makai resident[/purple][/jitter] who always wanted to leave [jitter][purple]Makai[/purple][/jitter]?

As you approach, the shopkeeper squints and smiles:

“[fade_in]Alona~ Want to buy something? Looks like we're from the same hometown; I'll give you a [green]20% discount[/green], okay?[/fade_in]”
TH_ALICE-LOUIS_SHOP.pages.BUY_POTION.des:
“[fade_in]Hmm[thinky_dots]...[/thinky_dots] I'll take some potions then?[/fade_in]”

After some thought, you decide to buy a few potions for emergencies.
TH_ALICE-LOUIS_SHOP.pages.BUY_HEAL.descr:
“[fade_in]Hmm[thinky_dots]...[/thinky_dots] Do you have healing services?[/fade_in]”

Given your current poor condition, you decide to get a healing套餐.
TH_ALICE-LOUIS_SHOP.pages.BUY_RELIC.desc:
“[fade_in]Ah[thinky_dots]...[/thinky_dots] Let me see some items![/fade_in]”

After careful consideration, you decide to purchase some new items.
TH_ALICE-RETURN_BOOK.title: Marisa, Return the Book!
TH_ALICE-RETURN_BOOK.pages.INITIAL.descr:
[fly_in]A black-and-white figure flashes past you, and you feel one of your most [purple]precious[/purple] books [jitter][red]disappear![/red][/jitter][/fly_in]

Looking around, only a suspicious [gold]blonde girl[/gold] in the distance is可疑.

[jitter]Yes, it must be her – [gold]Marisa[/gold] did this![/jitter]

So, what do you do?
TH_ALICE-RETURN_BOOK.pages.BACK.descript:
“[fade_in][jitter]That wretched black and white rat! I have to teach her a lesson today![/jitter]”[/fade_in]

You charge at [gold]Marisa[/gold] and demand your lost book back.

After paying a not-too-high price, you successfully snatch the book back from [gold]Marisa[/gold].
TH_ALICE-RETURN_BOOK.pages.REMOVE.descri:
You happen to have a few unused books you wanted to get rid of anyway. You整理 them and toss them to [gold]Marisa[/gold] as well.

Thinking this, you sort out some unwanted books and throw them to Marisa.
TH_ALICE-RETURN_BOOK.pages.RUN.descripti:
“[fade_in]Forget it[thinky_dots]...[/thinky_dots] I'll let her off this time! Next time[thinky_dots]...[/thinky_dots] Next time I'll make her pay!”[/fade_in]

After some thought, you decide not to bother with her, choosing to swallow your anger.
TH_ALICE-DOLL_PERFORM.title: Doll Performance
TH_ALICE-DOLL_PERFORM.pages.INITIAL.desc:
Unknowingly, you arrive at a stage where a performance is underway.

A traditional puppet play, or [gold]“Ningyō Jōruri”[/gold], is being performed.

Three people form a group, respectively扮演着 [green]reciter “Tayū”[/green], [red]shamisen player[/red], and [gold]doll operator[/gold], jointly handling one doll's performance.

What do you do?
TH_ALICE-DOLL_PERFORM.pages.JOIN.descrip:
It's a very traditional play, so you're fairly familiar with the plot.

Watching from below makes you [jitter]itchy to join[/jitter], so you decide to participate.

After showing these outdated residents the technique of “Otome Bunraku”, you unexpectedly receive quite a bit of [gold]tips[/gold].
TH_ALICE-DOLL_PERFORM.pages.WATCH.descri:
You sit and slowly watch the play.

Although the script and performance are quite [gold]old[/gold], they bring some [blue]inspiration[/blue] to your stagnant thinking.
TH_ALICE-MEET_SAKUYA.title: Encounter Sakuya
TH_ALICE-MEET_SAKUYA.pages.INITIAL.descr:
On your way to the higher floors, you catch a glimpse of a [jitter]somewhat familiar[/jitter] figure.

[jitter]Is that[thinky_dots]...[/thinky_dots][blue]Sakuya[/blue]?[/jitter]

She seems to recognize you too.

“[fade_in][jitter]Are you[thinky_dots]...[/thinky_dots][gold]Alice[/gold]?[/jitter]”

After a brief exchange, you confirm each other's identities and decide to exchange items – whatever is useless to one might be useful to the other.
TH_ALICE-MEET_SAKUYA.pages.EXCHANGE_RELI:
“[fade_in][jitter]Let's exchange items[/jitter][/fade_in].

You think it over and decide to swap items with Sakuya.
TH_ALICE-MEET_SAKUYA.pages.EXCHANGE_GOLD:
“[fade_in][jitter]I'll trade this for some money then[/jitter][/fade_in].

You decide to get some cash for the road ahead.
TH_ALICE-MEET_SAKUYA.pages.LEARN.descrip:
“[fade_in][jitter]I say, Killing Doll is also a [gold]Doll[/gold], right? Sakuya, teach me how to use Killing Doll!”[/jitter][/fade_in]

Through your persistent nagging, [blue]Sakuya[/blue] teaches you how to use Killing Doll.
TH_ALICE-PAST_FUTURE.title: Past, Future
TH_ALICE-PAST_FUTURE.pages.INITIAL.descr:
It's getting late, so you enter a nearby room to rest for the night before continuing.

However, shortly after you lie down, [fly_in]accompanied by a [jitter][gold]spinning[/gold][/jitter] sensation[/fly_in], the scene before you changes –

[fade_in]You find yourself standing on a stone bridge, flanked by [jitter][blue]endless river water.[/blue][/jitter][/fade_in]

[fade_in]On the opposite bank stands a figure similar in build to you, wearing clothes identical to yours, but looking more mature, like[thinky_dots]...[/thinky_dots][jitter] your [blue]future[/blue] self.[/jitter][/fade_in]

[fade_in]Behind you is a figure with a face somewhat similar to yours, but smaller and dressed completely differently, looking like – [red][jitter]no, you know, that's you[thinky_dots]...[/thinky_dots] your past appearance.[/jitter][/red][/fade_in]
TH_ALICE-PAST_FUTURE.pages.PAST.descript:
You look back at the past, and those [green]half-forgotten memories[/green] resurface, becoming clearer.

You are [gold]Alice Margatroid[/gold], the [red]seven[/red][orange]-[/orange][gold]colored[/gold] [green]doll[/green][blue] manipulator[/blue][purple].[/purple]

[jitter][red]But at the same time, you are also from [purple]Makai[/purple], the Creator's most beloved work.[/red][/jitter]
TH_ALICE-PAST_FUTURE.pages.FUTURE.descri:
You ignore the figure resembling your past self and walk straight to the opposite bank, then lose consciousness.

When you wake again, dawn is breaking.

The only thing you remember is that the figure疑似 your [blue]future[/blue] self said something about an ending, which had a [jitter][purple]profound impact[/purple][/jitter] on you.
